steps.title: Identify the causal relation
steps.content: The sentence explains the speed difference by pointing to physical features that limit swimming speeds more than flying speeds. The blank must describe the difference as a result of that fact.

steps.title: Reject reversed logic
steps.content: Choice B would make the speed difference a goal. Choice C would make it a rejection. Choice D would make the difference an explanation of the feature contrast, reversing the sentence's logic. A consequence is a result, which fits the causal phrase. The answer is A.
